vibe: Premium consulting firm + modern learning organization, minimalistic, elegant whitespace, strong typography, infographic-driven

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Data/Frameworks)
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-aligned for textual data, asymmetrical grids for visual tension

components.buttons: Flat solid colors, sharp edges or 2px radius, heavy hover transitions (-translate-y-1, darker color). No pill shapes.
components.cards: Cardless or 1px solid border with subtle ambient shadow. Infographic style with strict grid adherence.
components.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70) or solid white with 1px bottom border. Must include logo, 4 links, and primary CTA.
components.framework_visuals: SVG-based infographic flows. 1px connecting lines, monospace labels.
components.forms: Shadcn heavily customized. Square inputs, focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary, minimal borders.

motion_and_interactions.scroll: Lenis smooth scrolling for premium weight
motion_and_interactions.hover: Subtle translation (-translate-y-1) and high-contrast text color changes
motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up (Framer Motion) for F.L.I.G.H.T pillars and timelines

home.hero: Typography-led. Large Cabinet Grotesk headline 'Developing Leaders. Transforming Teams. Elevating Organizations.' Dark transparent overlay (bg-black/40) over the glass building image. Dual CTA (Solid Bronze for primary, Outline for secondary).
home.business_challenges: Bento grid of challenges leading to interventions. Monospace numbering (01, 02).
home.testimonials: Minimalist carousel (Swiper) or staggered grid. Large quotes, attribution in IBM Plex Mono.

about_flight.methodology: Interactive accordion or scroll-spy section for F, L, I, G, H, T. Each letter massive (text-[10vw]) on the left/background, with readable content overlaid.
about_flight.three_pillars: Develop Self / Team / Org. 3-column dense grid with distinct hover states revealing program metrics.

signature_programs.display: List view rather than cards. High-contrast data rows (infographic style) showing duration, target audience, and outcome.

cms_admin.layout: Control Room Grid (tight gaps, efficient density).
cms_admin.style: Swiss functional. White background, gray borders, high data density.

logos.description: Born in Flight Original Colored Logo

images.description: Modern glass building, represents organizational elevation
Clear glass interior architecture for structural pillars
Executive team meeting representing Develop Team pillar

testing.attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts from Google Fonts: Cabinet Grotesk (if available or use Clash Display/Satoshi), IBM Plex Sans, IBM Plex Mono.
Use standard Tailwind classes but avoid any generic Vercel/Stripe component look.
Do NOT use standard Shadcn Cards with rounded corners and soft shadows for the marketing pages. Use sharp 1px bordered divs with pure HTML/Tailwind.
Implement the 'Client Engagement Journey' as an infographic timeline, not just standard cards.
F.L.I.G.H.T methodology should be highly visual, leveraging massive typography and tight spacing.
Ensure hover states explicitly declare text colors to maintain contrast.
Use pure JSON object without Markdown code blocks.
